text: Capcom details Dragon’s Dogma 2: Dark Arisen, including dungeon challenges and new region Dark Arisen features expanded character customization

text: Microsoft is raising the price of Xbox consoles by $100-$150 The cheapest Xbox Series X console will retail for $750 from August 1

text: Epic Games CEO says it’s ‘really irresponsible’ of Steam to make studios disclose AI use Tim Sweeney claims it's a "Scarlet Letter" which makes players "try to kill the game"

text: Stellar Blade: Recruit Passcode Specialists quest walkthrough A full guide to Recruit Passcode Specialists and get the container passcode in Stellar Blade.

text: Sony confirms it’s laying off ‘most of the Destiny team’ and ‘some’ Marathon devs UPDATE: Bungie's studio head has also departed, according to reports

text: There may not be enough consoles this Christmas to meet demand, major retailer warns A surge in interest due to GTA 6 may see a short supply of PS5 and Xbox consoles running out

text: Ghost of Yotei sparks tourism push in Japan’s Mount Yotei region Towns around Mount Yōtei have launched merchandise and are planning tours

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Deltarune Chapter 6 set for 2027 release as Chapter 5 achieves new peak concurrent Steam players Deltarune Chapter 6 is set for 2027, Chapter 5 smashes the game's previous peak concurrent player count.

text: Olivia Rodrigo is the latest musician to arrive in Fortnite as a playable character She's available from today as part of the Icon Series
